title: Lucid Group (LCID) Stock Forecast: Analyst Ratings, Predictions & Price Target 2026
text: Public.com aggregates analyst ratings and price targets for Lucid providing crowdsourced sentiment indicators. Current consensus shows more sell ratings than buy ratings reflecting bearish sentiment. Average price target of $10-12 reflects modest upside from current levels but substantial downside risk. The platform shows increasing short interest and declining retail ownership. Analyst activity shows recent downgrades following Q1 2026 earnings miss. The sentiment indicators all point toward cautious positioning rather than conviction buying.
